title: HOMQUEN Pasta Bowls Set of 6, 37oz Salad Bowls Black Soup Bowls, Large Pasta Serving Bowls, Unbreakable Plastic Dinner Bowls, Dinnerware Sets,Valentines Day Gift, Dishwasher Safe (Black)
features: 6-Piece Pasta Bowls Set, Outstanding Cost-Effectiveness to Meet Family Needs: The set includes 6 plates, with sufficient quantity to meet the needs of daily family meals or entertaining guests. There is no need to buy multiple plates separately, solving your tableware needs in one stop with higher cost-effectiveness. Moreover, it is lightweight and easy to store, not taking up too much kitchen space, making kitchen organization easier.

Simple Black Appearance, Versatile for Various Scenes and Styles: The classic black design is simple and elegant, which can easily integrate into various kitchen decoration styles and table settings. Whether paired with modern minimalist, Nordic, or retro-style tableware, it looks harmonious and beautiful, enhancing the overall dining atmosphere and making your dining table more stylish.​

Versatile and Practical Design, Meeting Diverse Dietary Needs: This 6-piece set of black pasta plates is not only an ideal choice for serving noodles but also can easily handle various foods such as salads and soups. Whether it's for daily family meals, friend gatherings, or outdoor picnics, it can add a touch of elegance to your cuisine, making every meal full of ritual.​

Unbreakable High-Quality Plastic Material, Durable and Shatter-Resistant for More Peace of Mind: Crafted from high-quality plastic, it is sturdy in texture and has excellent shatter-resistant performance. Compared to traditional ceramic plates, it can better withstand collisions and drops in daily use, without the worry of breaking. Even families with children or pets can use it with confidence, reducing unnecessary troubles and losses for you.​

Dishwasher Compatible, Easy to Clean and Time-Saving: It can be completely put into the dishwasher for cleaning, eliminating the tedious steps of hand washing, allowing you to have more time to relax after meals. At the same time, the material is heat-resistant, and it is not easy to retain stains and odors after cleaning, keeping the plate surface clean as new, making it more worry-free to use.​
